content_body: The love of my life made my life and my birthday so very special. He proposed by candlelight, a fire, flowers, wine and birthday cake with candles in the shape of a heart. He made me feel so special. We had a great time, the cabin was beautiful and more than we expected. We went to Helen and Gatlinburg, dinner, watched movies, played poker, relaxed, cooked, and enjoyed the scenery.
title: Birthday Proposal in the North Georgia Mountains
